nodes.label: Welcome banner, ASCII art, skills summary, and update check for the CLI.  Pure d
Print ANSI-colored text through prompt_toolkit's renderer.
Get a color from the active skin, or return fallback.
Get a branding string from the active skin, or return fallback.
Return skills grouped by category, filtered by platform and disabled state.
Compare an embedded git revision to upstream main via ls-remote.      Returns 0
Count commits behind origin/main in a local checkout.
Parse '0.13.0' into (0, 13, 0) for comparison. Non-numeric segments become 0.
Fetch the latest version of a package from PyPI. Returns None on failure.
Compare installed version against PyPI latest.      Returns 0 if up-to-date, 1 i
Check whether a Mangaba update is available.      Two paths: if ``MANGABA_REVISI
Return the active Mangaba git checkout, or None if this isn't a git install.
Resolve a git revision to an 8-character short hash.
Return upstream/local git hashes for the startup banner.
Return ``(tag, release_url)`` for the latest git tag, or None.      Local-only —
Return the version label shown in the startup banner title.
Kick off update check in a background daemon thread.
Get result of prefetched check. Returns None if not ready.
Format a token count for display (e.g. 128000 → '128K', 1048576 → '1M').
Normalize internal/legacy toolset identifiers for banner display.
